{{CargoRelic
|name=Charles' Gold Ticket
|class_id=22172
|rank=AA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-15
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.12%), Wishing (0.03%)
|description=On Aug 15, 1985 AD, Charles found this golden voucher within the chocolate he bought with the money he picked up.<br>Golden vouchers were issued by Willy Wonk, owner of the Wonk Chocolate Factory. Anyone lucky enough to get one would be eligible to visit the factory. Charles, a poor boy who got this golden voucher by chance, embarked on his dream tour of the factory. After many wondrous experiences, the other 4 children on the tour with Charles had to leave early due to their greed. That is when Willy Wonk told Charles the true meaning of the golden voucher: to choose his successor. In the end, Charles inherits the chocolate factory, he holds on to this golden voucher with great care.
|fame=49
|art=41
|fth=38
|civ=66
|tech=34
|ss1=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +4<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +4<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80
|ss2=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +6<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80
|ss3=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +8<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80
|ss4=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +12<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80
|ss5=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +16<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +16<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80
|ss7=Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail ATK +16<br>Per 4 Gacha Gawd Packs claimed, Snail RUSH +16<br>Gacha Gawd Packs Claimed: 80/80<br>Snail RUSH +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's CIV +10
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Mutant Cells gained +7.5%
}}
